editorial_principle: Each field does not describe Milan but reconfigures its legibility as a stratified perceptual system in which time, space and identity co-occupy the same coordinates without resolution.

fields.label: palinsesto_urbano_attivo
fields.basho: Milan is not layered historically in a passive sense; it actively re-performs its past through spatial traces that remain operational — names, routes, buried infrastructures
fields.kokyu: temporal flow is non-linear and continuously reactivated; each present gesture reactivates at least one non-contemporary stratum
fields.activation_condition: any encounter with infrastructural or toponymic residue (Brera as field, Darsena as harbour, Navigli as buried canals)
fields.persistence_rule: field persists as long as at least one historical layer is functionally or linguistically active
fields.dissolution_rule: structurally non-dissolvable: urban rewriting is always recursive, never total
fields.textual_anchor_it: Una volta le autostrade di Milano erano liquide. Le merci correvano sulle acque.

fields.label: doppio_registro_coesistente
fields.basho: every Milanese site maintains two simultaneous regimes: functional present use and latent historical-legendary persistence; neither suppresses the other
fields.kokyu: perception does not alternate between regimes: it holds both simultaneously without transition or hierarchy
fields.activation_condition: presence of contemporary activity on historically charged terrain
fields.persistence_rule: field persists while both regimes remain partially legible
fields.dissolution_rule: field collapses only under total erasure of one regime — practically impossible in Milan

affects.field-05: the double register produces the friction between memory and use that characterizes all repeated urban gestures

fields.textual_anchor_it: La Darsena ora è il regno delle passeggiate alcoliche e dei photo dump con gli amici. Per secoli invece è stato il grande porto di Milano.

fields.label: tensione_verticale_orizzontale
fields.basho: Milan is structured by an unresolved geometric conflict between horizontal sedimentation (canals, streets, former fields) and vertical escalation (Duomo, towers, skyline regulation)
fields.kokyu: vertical growth is continuously negotiated against a symbolic ceiling defined by the Madonnina; horizontal memory resists vertical overwrite without ever blocking it
fields.activation_condition: any architectural gesture exceeding or approaching historical skyline thresholds
fields.persistence_rule: field persists as long as the Madonnina remains a perceptual reference point
fields.dissolution_rule: field cannot dissolve; it only mutates with each new vertical intervention
fields.textual_anchor_it: La posa della riproduzione si svolge in forma riservata. Nessuno dovrebbe rivelare nulla. Invece si sa tutto.

fields.label: invisibile_femminile_strutturale
fields.basho: female figures function as structural operators of the city's narrative system even when removed from explicit historiography; their absence is not void but active infrastructure
fields.kokyu: their temporal behavior is discontinuous: emergence, decisive action, archival erasure — a single non-linear cycle that repeats across centuries
fields.activation_condition: any historical or spatial narrative involving erased or marginalised female agency
fields.persistence_rule: field persists precisely through historiographic omission: the less named, the more structurally active
fields.dissolution_rule: structurally non-dissolvable due to archival incompleteness
fields.textual_anchor_it: C'è una strada a Milano chiamata Via Santa Marta. Il nome deriva da un monastero distrutto, dove una monaca in pieno Rinascimento ha visioni mistiche.

fields.label: attrito_memoria_uso
fields.basho: every urban object is simultaneously used and remembered; use never fully replaces memory, and memory never stabilizes use — friction is the permanent condition
fields.kokyu: friction between functional present and historical residue generates micro-instabilities in perception that accumulate without resolving
fields.activation_condition: repeated ritualized use of historically charged spaces (Galleria rotation, Navigli aperitivo, Cenacolo timed access)
fields.persistence_rule: field persists through repetition of urban gestures; each repetition adds residue without cancelling previous ones
fields.dissolution_rule: field dissolves only if repetition entirely ceases — structurally impossible in functioning urban systems
fields.textual_anchor_it: "Ci vediamo alle Colonne!" è una delle frasi più ripetute nei weekend milanesi.

system_note.system_behavior: fields operate as interference systems between memory, use and stratified perception; Milan remains permanently non-synchronous with itself
